infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to scan the doctor's QR code and to photograph previous medical reports.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Codoctor uses the microphone to transcribe the consultation in Bangla.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo access lets you attach a previous prescription or lab report so the AI can read your history.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Codoctor transcribes the Bangla consultation as the doctor and patient speak.

plugins.cameraPermission: Camera is needed to scan the doctor's QR code.
plugins.microphonePermission: Microphone is needed to capture audio during the consultation.

plugins.photosPermission: Attach a previous prescription or lab report so the AI can read your history.
plugins.cameraPermission: Photograph a paper report so the AI can read it.

plugins.microphonePermission: Codoctor uses the microphone to transcribe the consultation in Bangla.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Codoctor transcribes the Bangla consultation as the doctor and patient speak.
